mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, questionnaire_code, title, description, disease_scope, status, version_no, validated_flag, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM questionnaire WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questionnaire ( tenant_id, questionnaire_code, title, description, disease_scope, status, version_no, validated_flag ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{questionnaireCode}, #{title}, #{description}, #{diseaseScope}, #{status}, #{versionNo}, #{validatedFlag} )
